query:
-- position_questions tablosunun UPDATE işlemlerini engelle
DELIMITER //
CREATE TRIGGER prevent_update_position_questions
BEFORE UPDATE ON position_questions
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
  SIGNAL SQLSTATE '45000'
  SET MESSAGE_TEXT = 'position_questions tablosu kilitlidir. Sorular değiştirilemez.';
END//
DELIMITER ;

-- position_questions tablosunun DELETE işlemlerini engelle
DELIMITER //
CREATE TRIGGER prevent_delete_position_questions
BEFORE DELETE ON position_questions
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
  SIGNAL SQLSTATE '45000'
  SET MESSAGE_TEXT = 'position_questions tablosu kilitlidir. Sorular silinemez.';
END//
DELIMITER ;
